title: Fix test suite — get critical tests passing
description:
STILL BROKEN — build fails. agentic-embed is a CJS module, so named ESM imports do not work.

Build error:
SyntaxError: The requested module agentic-embed does not provide an export named localEmbed

agentic-embed exports (via default): create, chunkText, cosineSimilarity, localEmbed

Fix: Change line 1 of src/runtime/embed.js from:
import { localEmbed as agenticEmbed } from "agentic-embed"
to:
import agenticEmbedPkg from "agentic-embed"
const { localEmbed: agenticEmbed } = agenticEmbedPkg

OR use createRequire pattern. This is a P0 build blocker — the service cannot start.
